ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation this metric belongs to */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) */,
  "tpr" REAL /* True Positive Rate (TPR) */,
  "fpr" REAL /* False Positive Rate (FPR) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 Score */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_version_diff" (
  "diff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difference */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version this difference belongs to */,
  "diff_details" TEXT /* Details about the difference */,
  "diff_date" TEXT /* Date when the difference was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_diff_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)
